trivia_bullets.text: "Warned against wearing metal in a lightning storm, Smurt took it as a challenge." [Scryfall]. Named goblin 'Smurt' is a non-IP individual established only through this line — classic MTG flavor-text goblin archetype: reckless defiance read as bravado.

Common rarity makes Conduit Goblin Pauper-legal — one of the few MH3 energy cards to reach that format. Community brewing from June 2024 cited it as a potential Goblin Bushwhacker-style finisher in Pauper Boros energy shells alongside Glint Hawk and Kor Skyfisher.
sources: mtg.cardsrealm.com: Pauper 5 Decks with Modern Horizons 3, 2024

trivia_bullets.text: MH3 marked the return of energy counters to a major release after near-absence since Kaladesh block (2016–2017). Scryfall's all_parts field lists Conduit Goblin and Energy Reserve as explicitly flagged combo pieces — Wizards built these as an intentional mechanical pair.
sources: Scryfall API: all_parts — combo_piece with Energy Reserve (id: 1c516212-ad39-4396-8e05-ae57f100309f)

trivia_bullets.text: Previewed by the Goblin Lore Podcast via Twitter on 2024-05-22 — a thematically fitting reveal partner for a goblin card.
sources: Scryfall API: preview field (source: Goblin Lore Podcast, previewed_at: 2024-05-22)

related_cards.note: Scryfall-flagged combo piece with Conduit Goblin
